text:
ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/CERT/patches/CA-98-13/patch

This original patch has some bogus character like '=3D' include it.
It makes thepatch unavailable.

Fix: 

Please someone correct it ASAP, thanks!
How-To-Repeat: ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/CERT/patches/CA-98-13/patch

Then you will see that.
